config.title: Filtr produktów
config.script:
#include "50209" #include "50200"
function init(byval nDestFiltr , nIdobjFiltr) m_nDestFiltr = nDestFiltr m_nIdobjFiltr = nIdobjFiltr end function
dim dummy
dim m_nDestFiltr:m_nDestFiltr = clng(1) dim m_nIdobjFiltr:m_nIdobjFiltr = clng(0) dim m_strNameFiltr:m_strNameFiltr = ""
WVB_FILTER_RADIO(CTRL_RADIO_NAME,m_nDestFiltr,m_nDestFiltr,m_nIdobjFiltr) WVB_FILTER_CHOICELIST(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,dummy,m_nIdobjFiltr,m_strNameFiltr) WVB_FILTER_CHOICESEARCHTYPE(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,dummy,m_nIdobjFiltr,m_strNameFiltr) WVB_FILTER_GETTEXT(2,CTRL_LIST_NAME,m_nDestFiltr,m_nIdobjFiltr,m_strNameFiltr) WVB_FILTER_GETTEXT(3,CTRL_RAPORT_NAME,m_nDestFiltr,m_nIdobjFiltr,m_strNameFiltr)
function is_empty if m_nIdobjFiltr=0 then #ifdef _IOW if m_nDestFiltr<>1 and m_nDestFiltr<>4 then #else if m_nDestFiltr<>1 then #endif is_empty = true else is_empty = false end if else is_empty = false end if end function
function fok if is_empty then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Należy wybrać zakres produktów, które chcesz eksportować" else page_.result = true page_.goback end if end function
function fcancel page_.result = false page_.goback end function
private function get_where():get_where="" get_where = doc_.getmodule(60300).bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr(m_nDestFiltr , m_nIdobjFiltr) end function
function cursor_for_send_to_kasa():set cursor_for_send_to_kasa = nothing
dim where_for_prod:where_for_prod = get_where if where_for_prod = "" then exit function end if
dim strQuery:strQuery = _ " select " + _ " 'plu_code'=p_strindeks, " + _ " 'plu_name'=p_strnazwa, " + _ " 'plu_price'=c_curcenabrutto1, " + _ " 'plu_eVat'=p_eVat " + _ " from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania " + _ " where " + where_for_prod + _ " and coll_lp=1 " + _ " order by plu_code "
set cursor_for_send_to_kasa = trans_.createadors(strQuery)
end function
function cursor_for_send_to_collector(byval mag_id):set cursor_for_send_to_collector = nothing
dim where_for_prod:where_for_prod = get_where if where_for_prod = "" then exit function end if
#ifdef _IOW where_for_prod = Replace(where_for_prod,"[ID_MAGAZYN]",CStr(mag_id)) #endif
dim strQuery:strQuery = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("select 'ean' = c_strean,'cena' = c_curCenaNetto1, " + _ "'ilosc' = (select isnull(sum(gms_curIlosc),0) from n5gmstan where gms_pProd = p_idobj and gms_pOpak = c_idobj and ( isnull(gms_pMag,-1) = %2 or isnull(gms_pMag,-1) < 0)), " + _ "'nazwa' = p_strnazwa , 'prod_id' = p_idobj,'lp'=coll_lp " + _ #ifdef _IOW ",'indeks'=p_strindeks,'oznacz_prod'=p_strcecha1,'opis'=p_stropis " + _ "from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania " + _ "where rtrim(ltrim(p_strindeks)) <> '' " + _ #else "from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania " + _ " where rtrim(ltrim(c_strean)) <> '' " + _ #endif " and %1 ") _ (where_for_prod)(mag_id).Done() set cursor_for_send_to_collector = trans_.createadors(strQuery)
end function
function cursor_for_send_to_collector_na_dzien(byval mag_id,byval ddata_inwen):set cursor_for_send_to_collector_na_dzien = nothing
dim where_for_prod:where_for_prod = get_where if where_for_prod = "" then exit function end if
dim strQuery:strQuery = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("select 'ean' = v1.c_strean,'cena' = v1.c_curCenaNetto1, " + _ "'ilosc' = (select isnull(sum(gmo_curilosc),0) from n5gmop where gmo_pprod = v1.p_idobj and gmo_pmag= %2 and gmo_nnumop in (select v.p_nnumoper from vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje as v where v.c_pprodukt=v1.p_idobj and v.p_ddatawyst <=%3)),"+_ "'nazwa' = v1.p_strnazwa , 'prod_id' = p_idobj,'lp'=v1.coll_lp from vlist_n5produkt_listopakowania as v1 " + _ " where rtrim(ltrim(v1.c_strean)) <> '' " + _ " and v1.%1 ") _ (where_for_prod)(mag_id)(ddata_inwen).Done() set cursor_for_send_to_collector_na_dzien = trans_.createadors(strQuery)
end function
' DLA KASY FISKALNEJ!!!!!! 'send_products_to_kasa( 'dim strCode : strCode = cstr(pADOCursor("plu_code")) 'dim strName : strName = cstr(pADOCursor("plu_name")) 'dim curPrice : curPrice = ccur(pADOCursor("plu_price")) 'dim eVAT : eVAT = clng(pADOCursor("plu_eVAT"))
'DLA KOLEKTORA!!!!! 'send_products_to_collector 'dim strKodEAN : strKodEAN = cstr(pADOCursor("ean")) 'dim curCena : curCena = ccur(pADOCursor("cena")) 'dim curStanMag : curStanMag = ccur(pADOCursor("ilosc")) 'dim strNazwa : strNazwa = cstr(pADOCursor("nazwa"))

page.body:
XFORMMWIZZARDBEGIN(80842)
Wybierz produkty, ktore chcesz eksportować
WX_FILTER_BEGIN(CTRL_RADIO_NAME) WX_FILTER_ITEM_FIXED(Wszystkie aktywne) WX_FILTER_ITEM_CHOICELIST(Lista wyboru,CTRL_LIST_NAME) WX_FILTER_ITEM_SEARCHTYPE(Wynik wyszukiwania,CTRL_RAPORT_NAME) #ifdef _IOW WX_FILTER_ITEM_FIXED(Posiadające stan magazynowy) #endif WX_FILTER_END
XFORMMWIZZARD_TABLESEND
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
